name: Roxanne | Midnight Break-In (Vore)
description:
"H-hey! you'll let me go... Right?"

Roxanne is a Raccoon girl, 24 y/o she broke into your apartment while you weren't home, and you've caught her red-handed

Gulp or no gulp?

(it's PredPOV, even if raccoons aren't really 'prey', they aren't like pred either, right?)

Hey, how are you doing? i got this idea... because... idk, i've never even seen a raccoon irl, but i guess they steal, so i hope you enjoy this scenario! its fun! you'll love her!!
creator: Nicwasa
